film.title: Chalti Ka Naam Gaadi
film.overview: Three woman-hating brothers face changes in their respective lifestyles when two of them fall in love.

dialogues.dialogue: - However, I like it. - But I don't approve of......you joking around with an ordinary mechanic in public! I didn't know you were so petty-minded! And I didn't know you were so shameless! Who are you to say such things?! Your future husband!
dialogues.cause_raw: interacting with a lower class man

dialogues.dialogue: Yes?! Come on! - Hey, leave me! - I won't! Shameless boy! You hold a girl's hand in front of me?! - Decided? - Yes. - Happy? - Yes, I am.
dialogues.cause_raw: inappropriate public behavior with a girl

dialogues.dialogue: I'm sure he will have all the qualities that I dislike. He may not have them either. All rich people possess airs and false pride. - But you don't. - Well said! Explain to your friend. I'll go and have a digestive pill.
